text.title: Testing with pytest Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether testing-pytest applies. Root question is a yes/no observable on the incoming task; branches name a concrete observable (`when`) and conclude either with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the test target Python code intended for pytest 8.x?

branch.when: test depends on shared expensive setup

example.description: When `yes AND ≥3 cases share logic` holds, the tree concludes `rule:r3` — meaning the methodology applies via that specific rule. The agent should load the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follow it.
